
MCMC Diagnostics {data-navmenu="Diagnostics"}
=====================================

Row {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### MCMC Summary

```{r mcmc_summary}
diag <- mv$mcmc_diagnostics
info_df <- data.frame(
  Property = c(
    "Number of iterations",
    "Parameters sampled"
  ),
  Value = c(
    if (!is.null(diag$n_iter))
      as.character(diag$n_iter) else "Unknown",
    if (!is.null(diag$parameters))
      as.character(length(diag$parameters))
    else "Unknown"
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
knitr::kable(
  x = info_df,
  caption = "MCMC diagnostics summary",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```

### Spawning Biomass Posterior

```{r mcmc_sb}
mv_plot_trend(
  df    = mv$spawning_biomass,
  ylab  = "Spawning biomass",
  title = "Spawning Biomass (posterior median + 95% CI)"
)
```

### Recruitment Posterior

```{r mcmc_rec}
mv_plot_trend(
  df     = mv$recruitment,
  ylab   = "Recruitment",
  colour = "#2ca02c",
  title  = "Recruitment (posterior median + 95% CI)"
)
```

### Legal HR Posterior

```{r mcmc_hr}
mv_plot_trend(
  df     = mv$legal_hr,
  ylab   = "Legal harvest rate",
  title  = "Legal HR (posterior median + 95% CI)",
  ref_line = if (has_refpts &&
    !is.null(mv$ref_points$lUmsy))
    mv$ref_points$lUmsy else NULL,
  ref_label = if (has_refpts &&
    !is.null(mv$ref_points$lUmsy))
    "Umsy" else NULL
)
```
